name: Larrainvial Asset Management Administradora General - Fondo De Inversion Larrainvial Rentas Residenc
summary: Larrainvial Asset Management Administradora General - Fondo De Inversion Larrainvial Rentas Residenc invests in residential rental properties. Larrainvial Asset Management Administradora General manages the fund. The fund's objective is to generate income through investments in a diversified portfolio of residential properties for rental income.
